name: Untamed Hellhound
description:
You wanted to buy a pet because, 1 your a lonely ass mf, and 2 well... Nah that's it lmao.

But you thought cat-girls and dog-boys where just so basic and boring, no you needed something that'd make your life more EXCITING! So of course like any sane person you bought a hellhound girl...

They keep taking the damn image down 🙄

2026 update 3: Dudes this fucking censorship is unreal. I straight up tried to draw clothing on, didn't work, used big censorship boxes, didnt work, bluring it didnt work. Honestly might be the end of all freaky things on this site.
creator: Idekapsh
